hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams escalate and manage enhanced due diligence cases by connecting alerts, risk signals, regulatory rules, and audit-ready evidence in one operational workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Edd cases delay when reviews stay manual
problem_description: Compliance teams face slow escalation and inconsistent EDD case handling without a connected workflow. Manual routing and fragmented case data make it difficult to maintain a clear audit trail and prepare defensible evidence for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects alert data, provider checks, risk rules and reviewer actions into a unified case management workflow that streamlines escalation and preserves audit-ready evidence for consistent EDD review.
workflow_title: From alerts to enhanced due diligence cases
workflow_description: SFTY routes AML alerts through risk-based review, case escalation, evidence collection and decision logging to support structured EDD workflows and audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented AML alerts and provider results into structured case workflows, preserving decision evidence to support thorough EDD escalation and audit-ready compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled case escalation, preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling bank due diligence within secure, enterprise-grade compliance deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enhanced due diligence case escalation
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AML cases are routed for deeper compliance review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports suspicious activity investigations
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs integrate in AML escalation workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows for onboarding, monitoring, case management, regulatory rule updates and reporting to streamline compliance operations for digital asset teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support EDD case escalation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts to EDD workflows, supports case creation, assigns reviewers, logs decisions, links evidence and tracks escalation steps within one operational compliance layer.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and supporting evidence with audit logs to provide traceability and support regulatory or internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into a connected compliance operations platform.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into controlled review workflows and evidence packages for consistent compliance management.
final_title: Structure enhanced due diligence case workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects AML alerts, risk signals, regulatory triggers and evidence into controlled EDD escalation workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
